jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at RBI
jsonLd.description:
We at RBI are looking for an experienced Investment Banker based out of Howrah. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About RBI:
RBI is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Forecasting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RBI!
